changes.reason: P0 website feedback asked what to do when Notes has locked content and the password is forgotten; no current canonical covers locked Notes password boundaries.

queries: 备忘录 app 有上锁的内容 密码忘记了
Notes custom password reset old locked notes
iCloud locked notes device passcode login password
canonicalReview.notes: Existing password articles cover device passcode, Mac login password, iCloud storage, and Apple Account verification. None cover Notes-specific locked-note encryption, custom Notes password reset limits, or iCloud.com locked-note viewing limits.
